messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions

Positions:
- ABBV: growth archetype
- ABT: growth archetype
- AOS: growth archetype
- MMM: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Standstill in the Strait of Hormuz, new inflation data, Warsh's Senate hearing and more in Morning Squawk
    Summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

[1] Title: The Tech Download: Reputational damage, supply chain issues and local investment. What's next for Middle East tech?
    Summary: A two-week ceasefire was agreed between the U.S. and Iran on Wednesday, prompting hopes of the beginnings of the end of the conflict.

[2] Title: Alibaba just revealed it’s behind a viral AI video model dominating leaderboards
    Summary: A mysterious AI video model that has ascended global leaderboards has been confirmed as a project under Alibaba.

[3] Title: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Slip As Inflation And Oil Jitters Build - Yahoo Finance
    Summary: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNMUhsY0NEZi01RlhZYWdSM04xVGd3Q3BxSGozTmI5bGhiakJmUXQwMlgxQm1nUEJDWW91ZVhZdmtBV1hVdTVRcVBhQmZPb1JicjZwQ3Z2WFRiZ2pxbUdzQTVXRmlFOWtKdzM5a05RU1dOVDlnNXlETm9zV2hhYWJRUWVucUE0dEhWQ21seEFtZjl3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">US Stock Market Today S&P

[4] Title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slip As Inflation And Energy Worries Build - simplywall.st
    Summary: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi0gFBVV95cUxObVFLRWJRTWNJaEt1UGo4YWozQ0kxdXhxdzFjMmk1VGtQWkpyMXZSNHFwdGtxLXBLMTdpNFpUalNBN2Z2dE80bVU5VW42YnFmOFhWTGpnbjN4eHhlNFpWMTUwSkEyZDB5NGZac3RINVR6RXY4bnk1amZkV2VPMThLNlVsM254Rk0wb19VcTB3SHZ0cG5ncGNmYjgtRnhqWVhxSmlsWS1KN3JJbnoxbm10ZG1TSENPT3RXaE

  {"article_index": 3, "relevant": false, "affected_tickers": [], "event_type": "irrelevant", "why_it_matters": "General S&P 500 and inflation/energy market commentary without specific relevance to ABBV, ABT, AOS, or MMM."},
